title: SushiSwap Saved - 0xMaki Speaks Out
relevance_summary: Transaction exploiting fee claiming mechanism in SushiSwap

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls claimLP() without sufficient sushi balance

red_flags: Staking rewards not being claimed correctly
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls claimLP() without sufficient sushi balance
summary: An attacker exploited the fee claiming mechanism in SushiSwap by bypassing the expected behavior, leading to the theft of ~$15k worth of funds. A guard could have prevented this by blocking transactions that attempt to claim LP tokens without sufficient sushi balance.
